positive: A central, symmetrical, stylized illustration of a roaring celestial lion head and mane, rendered in a neo-art deco aesthetic. The lion should have sharp, geometric lines, flowing symmetrical mane details, and glowing cosmic elements within its eyes and teeth. Incorporate deep indigo and gold accents contrasted with stark black negative space. The composition must be clean, suitable for apparel printing, with strong contrast and defined silhouettes. Overhead, subtle constellations and abstract nebula shapes should frame the head. Highly detailed, vector art quality, flat composition.
